MINI MINUTES:
Attorney, David F. Monsour of Barr & Young (925-314-9999), appears for petitioner

No Other Appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling. PETITIONER V. JOHN THRELKELD'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Written order and judgment are signed and filed in open court.
